window_summary: This window tracks the recent php/php-src release stream across multiple minor versions, including security and bug fix releases for PHP 8.1 through 8.5, culminating in the feature release PHP 8.5.0.

chunks.title: PHP 8.1.33
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: php/php-src
Release: PHP 8.1.33
Tag: php-8.1.33; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-07-03T15:56:27Z; created_at: 2025-07-01T21:13:32Z
Release notes:
The PHP development team announces the immediate availability of PHP 8.1.33. This is a security release.
All PHP 8.1 users are encouraged to upgrade to this version.
For source downloads of PHP 8.1.33 please visit our [downloads page](https://www.php.net/downloads.php), Windows source and binaries can be found on [windows.php.net/download/](https://windows.php.net/download/). The list of changes is recorded in the [ChangeLog](https://www.php.net/ChangeLog-8.php#8.1.33).
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the php/php-src repository, release PHP 8.1.33 is a security release announced on 2025-07-03. All PHP 8.1 users are encouraged to upgrade.

chunks.title: PHP 8.5.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: php/php-src
Release: PHP 8.5.0
Tag: php-8.5.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-11-20T18:58:07Z; created_at: 2025-11-18T08:04:03Z
Release notes:
The PHP development team announces the immediate availability of PHP 8.5.0. This release marks the latest minor release of the PHP language.
PHP 8.5 comes with numerous improvements and new features such as:
New "URI" extension
New pipe operator (|>)
Clone With
New #[\NoDiscard] attribute
Support for closures, casts, and first class callables in constant expressions
And much much more...
For source downloads of PHP 8.5.0 please visit our [downloads page](https://www.php.net/downloads.php), Windows source and binaries can be found on [windows.php.net/download/](https://windows.php.net/download/). The list of changes is recorded in the [ChangeLog](https://www.php.net/ChangeLog-8.php#8.5.0).
The [migration guide](https://php.net/manual/en/migration85.php) is available in the PHP Manual. Please consult it for the detailed list of new features and backward incompatible changes.
Kudos to all the contributors and supporters!
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the php/php-src repository, release PHP 8.5.0 is the latest minor release announced on 2025-11-20. It introduces new features including a new URI extension, a pipe operator (|>), Clone With, a #[\NoDiscard] attribute, and support for closures, casts, and first class callables in constant expressions.

Tag: php-8.4.21; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-05-07T17:18:08Z; created_at: 2026-05-05T16:42:57Z
Release notes:
The PHP development team announces the immediate availability of PHP 8.4.21. This is a security release.
All PHP 8.4 users are encouraged to upgrade to this version.
For source downloads of PHP 8.4.21 please visit our [downloads page](https://www.php.net/downloads.php), Windows source and binaries can also be found [there](https://www.php.net/downloads.php?os=windows&version=8.4). The list of changes is recorded in the [ChangeLog](https://www.php.net/ChangeLog-8.php#8.4.21).
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the php/php-src repository, release PHP 8.4.21 is a security release announced on 2026-05-07. All PHP 8.4 users are encouraged to upgrade.

chunks.title: PHP 8.2.31
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: php/php-src
Release: PHP 8.2.31
Tag: php-8.2.31; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-05-07T17:18:43Z; created_at: 2026-05-05T14:28:49Z
Release notes:
The PHP development team announces the immediate availability of PHP 8.2.31. This is a security release that addresses CVE-2026-6735, CVE-2026-7259, CVE-2025-14179, CVE-2026-6722, CVE-2026-7261, CVE-2026-7262, CVE-2026-7568, and CVE-2026-7258.
All PHP 8.2 users are encouraged to upgrade to this version.
For source downloads of PHP 8.2.31 please visit our [downloads page](https://www.php.net/downloads.php), Windows source and binaries can also be found [there](https://www.php.net/downloads.php?os=windows&version=8.2). The list of changes is recorded in the [ChangeLog](https://www.php.net/ChangeLog-8.php#8.2.31).
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the php/php-src repository, release PHP 8.2.31 is a security release announced on 2026-05-07 that addresses CVE-2026-6735, CVE-2026-7259, CVE-2025-14179, CVE-2026-6722, CVE-2026-7261, CVE-2026-7262, CVE-2026-7568, and CVE-2026-7258. All PHP 8.2 users are encouraged to upgrade.

questions.query_text: In the php/php-src repository, which release introduces a new URI extension and a pipe operator (|>)?

answer_support.answer_text: introduces new features including a new URI extension, a pipe operator (|>)

questions.query_text: Across the php/php-src releases, how does the security release PHP 8.2.31 differ from the security release PHP 8.5.6?

options.text: PHP 8.2.31 explicitly lists addressed CVEs, while PHP 8.5.6 does not list specific CVEs in its release note.
PHP 8.2.31 is a bug fix release, while PHP 8.5.6 is a security release.
PHP 8.2.31 introduces a pipe operator, while PHP 8.5.6 introduces a URI extension.
Both releases are identical in content and only differ in version number.

questions.query_text: In the php/php-src release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a bug fix release for PHP 8.4 announced on 2025-08-05, (2) a security release for PHP 8.1 announced on 2025-07-03, (3) a feature release introducing a pipe operator and Clone With, (4) a security release for PHP 8.2 that lists multiple CVEs.

answer_support.answer_text: introduces new features including ... pipe operator (|>), Clone With
